controls.title: ML Model Access
controls.description: Adversary gains some level of access to an ML model.

controls.title: ML Attack Staging
controls.description: Adversary prepares resources for an attack against an ML system.

controls.title: Active Scanning
controls.description: Adversary probes an ML system to gather information for targeting.

controls.title: Search for ML Artifacts
controls.description: Adversary searches for publicly available ML artifacts to use in attacks.

controls.title: Search for Victim's Publicly Available ML Information
controls.description: Adversary searches for public information about victim's ML systems.

controls.title: ML Supply Chain Compromise
controls.description: Adversary compromises ML supply chain to insert malicious components.

controls.title: User Execution
controls.description: Adversary relies on user to execute malicious ML content.

controls.title: Valid Accounts
controls.description: Adversary uses compromised credentials to access ML systems.

controls.title: Evade ML Model
controls.description: Adversary crafts inputs to evade ML model detection.

controls.title: Obtain Capabilities
controls.description: Adversary obtains ML-specific tools and resources.

controls.title: Develop Capabilities
controls.description: Adversary develops ML-specific attack tools and techniques.

controls.title: Backdoor ML Model
controls.description: Adversary embeds hidden functionality in ML models.

controls.title: Publish Poisoned Datasets
controls.description: Adversary publishes poisoned datasets for victim consumption.

controls.title: Poison Training Data
controls.description: Adversary manipulates training data to corrupt model behavior.

controls.title: Exfiltration via ML Inference API
controls.description: Adversary exfiltrates training data or model information via inference API.

controls.title: Exfiltration via Cyber Means
controls.description: Adversary exfiltrates ML artifacts through traditional cyber channels.

controls.title: Erode ML Model Integrity
controls.description: Adversary degrades model performance or trustworthiness.

controls.title: Cost Harvesting
controls.description: Adversary abuses ML inference to impose financial costs on victim.

controls.title: Denial of ML Service
controls.description: Adversary disrupts availability of ML system.

controls.title: Data from Information Repositories
controls.description: Adversary collects data from ML-related information repositories.

controls.title: ML Model Inference API Access
controls.description: Adversary obtains access to ML model inference API.

controls.title: Verify Attack
controls.description: Adversary verifies that an attack achieved its intended effect.

controls.title: Craft Adversarial Data
controls.description: Adversary crafts data specifically designed to exploit ML model vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Full ML Model Access
controls.description: Adversary gains full access to ML model internals (white-box).

controls.title: ML-Enabled Product or Service
controls.description: Adversary exploits ML-enabled product or service.

controls.title: Discover ML Model Family
controls.description: Adversary identifies the model architecture or family.

controls.title: Exploit Public-Facing Application
controls.description: Adversary exploits public-facing ML application.

controls.title: Command and Scripting Interpreter
controls.description: Adversary uses code execution to interact with ML systems.

controls.title: LLM Prompt Injection
controls.description: Adversary crafts prompts to manipulate LLM behavior.

controls.title: Direct Prompt Injection
controls.description: Attacker directly manipulates user-facing prompt to alter model behaviour.

controls.title: Indirect Prompt Injection
controls.description: Hidden instructions in content the model processes (documents, web, RAG).

controls.title: Phishing
controls.description: Adversary uses social engineering to gain access to ML systems.

controls.title: Discover ML Model Ontology
controls.description: Adversary discovers the ontology or label space of a model.

controls.title: LLM Jailbreak
controls.description: Adversary circumvents model safety guardrails via crafted prompt sequences.

controls.title: Unsafe Model Output
controls.description: ML model produces unsafe, harmful, or unintended outputs.

controls.title: LLM Data Leakage
controls.description: Adversary extracts sensitive training data from LLM responses.

controls.title: LLM Plugin Compromise
controls.description: Adversary compromises or exploits LLM plugins and tool integrations.

controls.title: Output Manipulation
controls.description: Crafting inputs that produce tool calls with destructive parameters; Crafting inputs that produce malicious executable code in agent output; Crafting inputs that produce dangerous outputs consumed by downstream systems

controls.title: Automated Collection
controls.description: Agent autonomously harvesting data through tool chains beyond authorised scope; LLM autonomously collecting data beyond its intended access scope

controls.title: Valid Accounts
controls.description: Exploiting legitimate agent credentials to access AI systems or data pipelines; Using compromised agent credentials to impersonate trusted agents in A2A channels

controls.title: Data Poisoning
controls.description: Injecting malicious content into agent persistent memory or RAG stores; Injecting malicious data into training pipelines to corrupt model behaviour

controls.title: Embedding Manipulation
controls.description: Crafting content whose embeddings bias future retrieval results in attacker's favour; Crafting inputs whose embeddings manipulate similarity search results

controls.title: Denial of ML Service
controls.description: Triggering cascading failure propagation to exhaust system resources or degrade service; Adversary saturates GenAI pipeline � vector store, RAG retrieval, or inference endpoint rendered unavailable; Overloading AI systems with computationally expensive inputs to cause service degradation

controls.title: Disinformation
controls.description: Agent generates persuasive false information to manipulate human approvals; Adversary publishes false content in public repositories, documentation sites, or knowledge bases indexed by RAG systems; Using AI-generated content to deliberately spread false information

controls.title: Membership Inference
controls.description: Adversary determines whether specific sensitive records were used in training � confirms presence of target data; Ungoverned training data status � adversary determines what sensitive data is in scope without classification barriers; Sensitive multimodal content in training data confirmed through membership inference queries

controls.title: Discover ML Model Ontology
controls.description: Adversary learns what data the browser assistant can access across open applications

controls.title: Model Inversion
controls.description: Adversary reconstructs sensitive training examples from model outputs through systematic query campaigns; Reconstructing sensitive training data from model outputs

controls.title: Data Leakage
controls.description: Unintended exposure of training data or sensitive context through model outputs

controls.title: Information Disclosure
controls.description: Extraction of confidential information via targeted model queries

controls.title: Configuration Exposure
controls.description: Extraction of internal model configuration, instructions, or system prompts

changelog.change: Initial seed — 37 ATLAS techniques from v4.0
changelog.author: emmanuelgjr
